invariants.description: Borrow capacity must reflect fair oracle prices, not thin-liquidity manipulation
Liquidations must restore protocol solvency without socializing bad debt
Reserve liquidity must not be drainable via mispriced collateral loops
Stale oracle prices must not enable undercollateralized borrows
Flash loans must settle atomically without leaving protocol under-reserved

assumptions: KLend oracle feeds may be manipulable on thin pairs
No mainnet probing — catalogue analogue for zero-RPC validation
